summary: Backend regression suite for TransitPulse: 23/23 tests passed covering seeded data, route search, CRUD, auth-gated reports, voting with trust-score updates, and Claude-powered AI endpoints (predict-eta, recommend-route).

minor.issue: No auth/rate-limit; per spec it is intentional for crowd-sourced updates but is easily abusable.
No auth required - anyone can create stops/buses. Confirm intended for MVP.
Author can vote on their own report (no self-vote guard) and gain trust_score; consider blocking self-votes.
Returns plain User dict via model_dump but datetime serialization OK; consider stripping created_at if not needed.

action_items: Consider blocking self-vote in POST /api/reports/{report_id}/vote (author voting on own report increases trust_score).
Decide whether POST /api/stops and POST /api/buses should require auth in production.
Add rate limiting on POST /api/buses/{bus_id}/location to mitigate abuse of open endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~600 lines and mixes models, helpers, routes, AI logic, and seed. Consider splitting into routers/ (auth.py, buses.py, reports.py, ai.py) and models.py for maintainability.
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan context manager.
ai_spam_check / predict_eta / recommend_route parse JSON from LLM output with naive find('{')..rfind('}') - works but fragile. Consider using LlmChat structured output or pydantic-ai validation.
predict-eta and recommend-route accept loose dict payloads instead of Pydantic models - no input validation.
doc_to_model is called sometimes on already-mutated dicts; the spread `{**b}` then doc_to_model in route_search is wasteful but harmless.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers will reject; for production set explicit origins.
Session token is taken from Authorization Bearer header OR cookie; tokens are stored raw (not hashed) in db.sessions - acceptable for MVP but document it.
test_credentials: Test sessions injected via pymongo into db.sessions; fixture creates per-test users and cleans up.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 12 stops + 4 buses (M15/B25/M5/Q44) on startup; verified present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. backend_test.py covers all endpoints listed in the review request plus AI integration. Reuse fixtures `auth_token` / `auth_headers` for any new auth-gated tests. Cleanup of TEST_ prefixed data and Test User reports happens automatically.
